reviews.comment:
Buena ubicación (sobre la ruta) con bar y kiosco incluído. Buena atención del personal de playa. Baños bien limpios.

(Translated by Google)
Good location (right on the main road) with a bar and kiosk included. Good service from the beach staff. Clean restrooms.

reviews.comment:
Completa estación de servicio donde se puede parar y almorzar minutas o sanguchitos. Hay varios súper mercados en la cercanía. Si van de vacaciones a Brasil es parada obligada para comprar Reales. Los arbolitos se ponen a la salida de la estación y se acercan a ofrecer el cambio. En mí experiencia siempre fueron confiables. Recomiendo descargar con el wifi de la estación de servicio la ficha de Migraciones y completarla para tenerla lista al entrar a Brasil.

(Translated by Google)
This is a complete gas station where you can stop and grab a quick lunch or sandwiches. There are several supermarkets nearby. If you're vacationing in Brazil, it's a must-stop for buying Brazilian Reais. Money changers set up outside the station and approach you offering to exchange currency. In my experience, they've always been reliable. I recommend downloading the immigration form using the gas station's Wi-Fi and filling it out so you have it ready when you enter Brazil.

reviews.comment:
Similar al ACA Posadas, muy pocas ganas de atender el personal, todo lento, lo único bueno que es YPF , la atención al cliente pésima. La amabilidad muy buena.

(Translated by Google)
Similar to the ACA Posadas, the staff seems unwilling to help, everything is slow, the only good thing is that it's a YPF station, the customer service is terrible. The friendliness is very good, though.
